# commands

```go
import "github.com/sweet-juice/sweetjuice/cmd/commands"
```

Package commands implements the core orchestration logic for the juice CLI. It manages high\-level workflows such as project bootstrapping, plugin management, and platform\-specific pipeline execution.

- [Constants](<#constants>)

## Constants

<a name="RepoURL"></a>

```go
const (
    // RepoURL is the upstream repository for wails-mobile templates.
    RepoURL = "https://github.com/sweet-juice/sweetjuice"
    // Version is the current version of the juice CLI.
    Version = "v1.4.0"
    // ReleaseAsset is the name of the template archive to download.
    ReleaseAsset = "template.zip"
    // DownloadURL is the full URL to the latest template release.
    DownloadURL = RepoURL + "/releases/latest/download/" + ReleaseAsset
)
```

<a name="CreateNewProject"></a>
## func CreateNewProject

```go
func CreateNewProject(targetDir string)
```

CreateNewProject bootstraps a new wails\-mobile project in the specified directory. It downloads the template, initializes Go Mobile tools, and scaffolds the native projects.

<a name="ExecuteBuild"></a>
## func ExecuteBuild

```go
func ExecuteBuild(platform, mode string)
```

ExecuteBuild compiles the project for the specified platform and mode using native tools. It automatically triggers a refresh pass before compilation.

<a name="ExecuteRefresh"></a>
## func ExecuteRefresh

```go
func ExecuteRefresh(platform string)
```

ExecuteRefresh triggers a platform\-specific synchronization pass. For Android, this typically runs gomobile bind and syncs native plugins. For iOS, it runs gomobile bind natively.

<a name="ExecuteRun"></a>
## func ExecuteRun

```go
func ExecuteRun(platform string)
```

ExecuteRun compiles, installs, and launches the application on a connected device.

<a name="ManagePlugin"></a>
## func ManagePlugin

```go
func ManagePlugin(action, pluginRepo string)
```

ManagePlugin handles the installation and removal of native Go/Mobile plugins. It manages go.mod dependencies and synchronizes native source files into the intermediate staging area.

<a name="ShowUsage"></a>
## func ShowUsage

```go
func ShowUsage()
```

ShowUsage prints the help information for the juice CLI.
